outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected due to negative aggregate GEX and proximity to Gamma Flip.
outlook.summary: Market exhibits extreme bearish positioning with heavily elevated Put/Call ratios and a strong volatility smirk. Negative GEX in 0DTE and Monthly expiries creates an unstable, fragile environment prone to amplified moves. Spot is strongly pinned to the 710-711 region due to massive 0DTE Put OI and Max Pain, but faces strong downward gravity from the 690 Monthly Max Pain. Losing the 708 Weekly Gamma Flip will likely trigger sharp downside acceleration.

outlook.summary: The market is in a dealer-long-gamma regime with a massive total GEX of 15.15B, which strongly suppresses volatility. High put/call ratios and a bearish volatility smirk indicate heavy protective hedging, creating rigid structural floors. Expect the price to be magnetically attracted to the 7100 0DTE Max Pain, while being strictly capped by the 7200 Call Resonance Wall.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call Open Interest (10.4k in 0DTE, 12.1k in WEEKLY, 3.8k in MONTHLY) creates a multi-expiry structural ceiling exactly at this round number.
Significant Put OI across all expiries combined with its proximity to the Monthly Gamma Flip (6998.19) establishes a massive structural and psychological support floor.
Heavy Put concentration (29.3k OI in MONTHLY, 4k in WEEKLY) reinforces a deep downside support level, further backed by the Weekly Gamma Flip at 6935.
The 0DTE Max Pain level coincides with high Put OI and extreme Put volume (68k), creating an active magnetic pull for the daily session.
Strong Put OI and exceptional volume in both 0DTE and WEEKLY expiries create a secondary support cluster just above the 7000 psychological level.
Dominant 0DTE Call OI (16.4k) acts as an absolute upside ceiling for the current daily session, capping any aggressive upside squeezes.
